description_long: This is a modern apartment building with three stories, featuring a flat white roof with geometric cutouts and a mix of white and natural wood-toned exterior panels. The building is surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn, white picket fencing, and several tall, slender trees, giving it a suburban feel. Large, rectangular windows and multiple balconies with minimalist railings are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light and outdoor space for residents. The ground level includes a shaded patio area with outdoor furniture and a circular umbrella, enhancing the communal living experience. The structure is characterized by clean lines, asymmetrical window arrangements, and a combination of open and enclosed spaces. The overall design emphasizes functionality, simplicity, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A three-story modern apartment building with a flat roof, large windows, and multiple balconies, surrounded by a white fence and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two prominent balconies, and tall trees flanking the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled facade, three stacked balconies, and a clear view of the white picket fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large patio area with outdoor furniture and umbrella, as well as the building's geometric roof cutouts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the alternating balcony arrangement and additional landscaping along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical, horizontal pattern with some vertical stacking and groupings, providing a balanced yet modern look.
